content:
# elizaos/elizaos.github.io Weekly Report (Apr 12 - 18, 2026)

## 🚀 Highlights
Development activity for the week of April 12–18, 2026, was focused on maintaining the stability and security of the project infrastructure. The primary effort centered on proactive dependency management to ensure the repository remains aligned with current project standards. No new features or bug fixes were introduced during this period, reflecting a focus on foundational maintenance.

## 🛠️ Key Developments

### Dependency Management
*   **Infrastructure Maintenance:** The project team initiated updates for the minor-and-patch dependency group to ensure the codebase remains secure and up-to-date. This effort is captured in PR [#246](https://github.com/elizaos/elizaos.github.io/pull/246), which remains open and under review.

## 🐛 Issues & Triage
*   **Closed Issues:** There were no issues closed during this reporting period.
*   **New & Active Issues:** No new issues were opened between April 12 and April 18, and there are currently no active issues tracked in the repository.

## 💬 Community & Collaboration
Collaboration this week was centered on the review process for PR [#246](https://github.com/elizaos/elizaos.github.io/pull/246). As the repository saw no new issue reports or additional pull requests, the community focus remained exclusively on the maintenance of existing infrastructure.
